description: Import a stack of raw BMP images representing a cranial scan from '/home/ga/Documents/scan_images/' into InVesalius 3 and reconstruct a 3D model. Use the scanning parameters provided by the lab technician: Pixel Spacing (X, Y) = 0.957 mm and Slice Thickness (Z) = 1.5 mm. Create a bone segmentation mask, generate a 3D surface, and export it as a binary STL file to '/home/ga/Documents/calibrated_skull.stl'.
